textByHash.6b683012f7cfcfe909299bae33b719c627f3147c: I'm a little busy trying to solve that mad wizard's puzzle. If you have any questions, ask him instead.
textByHash.aa047eddb681eac3fe4a6713184ea31ef8101920: Why? Do you think I need your help to solve this? I'll prove I'm smarter than these two!
textByHash.48531178ada8b4e92e5a8f23d03019a61bd0cf89: You think I'll be persuaded that easily? I'm not as easy to fool as the others, but I admire your efforts nonetheless.
textByHash.b1e2cc32ff3d800465b7a46f7d79f491c4b2da1d: Well that's infinitely more interesting! In that case, why do you care about the puzzle?
textByHash.b2267649dfdd51f0862d2cff55f909e48891c57f: Very well, you appear to be telling the truth, and I'd rather be uncovering a teleportation matrix than doing this.
textByHash.f057cc9830d3befc15b8b9eda68cb62c8bf79896: But you said that only the first of us to solve it would pass!
textByHash.2751d56d2596bd114d3f32c7f683221bbf0ab41f: Traiborn says I'm allowed to help you with this teleportation matrix. You should speak to Sedridor in the basement.
textByHash.f260d5349aaf2aa7b66a2d0415713bbfa00462dc: Well what are we waiting for? Let's go in!
textByHash.1acce548cceccc6bdd09c3733398aa7dc8d1c7fc: There's something strange about this big hole here. It's giving out the tiniest amount of magical energy. I can't work out what it is though.
textByHash.92c74e20717b9fc8b80f17bad3adc0b7e9384722: Quiet! I'm more than capable of working this out. Maybe you should go help the others instead.
textByHash.66d7080755bd6352a20c1b4d1ea3a10ba24156be: Don't disturb me! I'll need absolute silence if I'm to work out what this mysterious energy is.
textByHash.305e4bbd3c38b680908a85efeba930354c8a7176: That large hole behind you is radiating a strange energy. I'm still trying to work out what it is.
textByHash.12194ba7af8aa4d7bfb656f39e42db9b6361dfb2: No, I can work it out.
textByHash.4422926fd601a66b0a59a0df6da7636744d86843: Of course! I've worked out what the energy from that hole is. It's abyssal energy!
textByHash.60d553ba943a304572f2cec860122aa7944b062b: You don't belong in this temple, accursed filth!
textByHash.ada3cd9a2a9f6193cce08860f95020335310d6c9: Well don't think I'll be stopping them all again! I may be powerful, but that spell still took a lot out of me.
textByHash.e667042c2bd414b6e7d8edd3a50d2a1c72862830: If you're hoping I can help in some way, you're out of luck. I may be powerful, but that spell still took a lot out of me. You'll have to hope the others can do something.
textByHash.239d50bef3ac8a8c89d565c8476eb402ddfafa2d: The Scar? But I thought this was meant to be a teleportation matrix.
textByHash.ba0efdf3c42850ea872f0d68a30423c4e1d627c9: But it's been sealed again now! The danger is gone.
textByHash.04b5039cfd03243057739f718b3fd1f68fa23e95: Well if you two are staying, I guess I will as well.
textByHash.bcbaebed8892eadb6174a6184ceb19ffa7e1f1ec: I need 25 abyssal pearls to unlock the contact with the mage who knows how to repair a pouch. After the contact has been unlocked, it will cost you 1 abyssal pearl each time to repair the pouches.
textByHash.d79b3cb478b1a01753b7a2c8b0134dad607c6845: Now bear with me whilst I contact the mage.
textByHash.248f500a7a74213b921b28b2a32ca129051601a5: OK. The contact has been set up.
textByHash.fa5856efd738f0a392b476707b42382c51cb2c0e: It will cost you 1 abyssal pearl to repair the pouches.
textByHash.f5e84565a8ef66322d1392aac676ad884cde84c7: You don't seem to have any pouches in need of repair.
textByHash.cde7aa16e3f5e945aa68a347bdcedf33977f3149: Bear with me whilst I make the contact for repairing the pouches.
textByHash.ad8ae6c736f9def5957278ec9f493344164a24b7: Hello, I know you can hear me.
textByHash.716131deafdf135babea16e970816cdc1dd893f8: Ding Dong, Ding Dong. You can't keep me waiting.
textByHash.32b7708ce9e6135e53cb3f8319307cdc444d6b88: I got someone here in need of a pouch repair.
textByHash.18df27f26fe0013ffc0e924aac7ec10ec9404a37: We need to assemble rift guardian before those creatures arrive!
textByHash.4e139b90924da8f781d7d6219a24c60833e99c85: We need shield barriers up before anything comes through that rift!
textByHash.d1fde3b89008fa10212417d7227240bacd976cf7: We need to protect the Great Guardian!
textByHash.28892bf16edb8b59c5c4a8c9df5cb6b863fbed70: We need to power up the Great Guardian!
